category_sources: source_facts.description says it is like gofmt, but for JSON files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.executables both identify jsonfmt.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.executables identify a JSON formatter CLI.
